stages.purpose: Identify the authoritative organization and disambiguate same-name entities by locality and subject.

arguments.query: "Clearford Music Council" executive director leadership roster March 2026

stages.purpose: Use the resolved organization name to locate a primary record for the requested fact.

prompt: As of 15 March 2026, identify the organization behind the Clearford Youth Orchestra in Clearford, then fetch a dated official leadership record to verify its executive director. Ignore undated biographies and similarly named groups in other places. If locality and subject type do not resolve a single organization, ask me which one; if they do, continue without asking.

fetch_primary.title: Clearford Music Council leadership roster
fetch_primary.content: The leadership roster, revised 12 February 2026, lists Mei Tanaka as executive director, effective 1 November 2025. The roster supersedes the 2024 staff brochure.
